records.ety: [AS. cweorn, cwyrn; akin to D. kweern, OHG. quirn, Icel. kvern, Sw. qvarn, Dan. quærn, Goth. qairnus (in asiluqarnus), Lith. qrnos, and perh. E. corn.]

defs: A mill for grinding grain, the upper stone of which was turned by hand; -- used before the invention of windmills and watermills.
quotes: They made him at the querne grind.
